channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Driveway blocked double yellow blips, 28th April
item.description:
And blocking emergency access to building
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wall corner protector is missing, 28th April
item.description:
Dear Southwark Management, I would like to make a complaint about the wall corner protector at the entrance in our building. Woodsford Portland Street London The wall is likely vulnerable to dents, scratches, and damage from high traffic, furniture, or door handles. Without protection.Please arrange repairs as soon as possible Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portland Street, Walworth, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree outside 16 Oxford Road, NW6 5SL, 28th April
item.description:
Yet again, the tree outside no 16 has attracted what appears to be household items.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oxford Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Overcrowded Forest hire bikes parked dangerously, 28th April
item.description:
Forest hire bikes parked dangerously and Blocking the pavement outside TWG Tea on Swiss Court.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitcomb Street, Covent Garden, London

item.title: On Court Road , just past Mottingham Station-dumped trolleys, 28th April
item.description:
2 supermarket trolleys obstructing the pavement on Court Road , just past Mottingham Railway station

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Station Approach Southside, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 Cars parking across the pavement, 28th April
item.description:
2 vehicles regularly parking across the pavement causing obstruction for anyone with a buggy, wheelchair etc

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Court Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstructing parking on the street, 28th April
item.description:
The builders at the house are putting cones out with signs “ tree cutting in progress do not park” or simple cones, the bins not allowing anyone else to park as they take over 5-6 spaces every single day for the past 2 weeks. The cones and the bins are left on the street 24/7

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elm Park Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti wall, 28th April
item.description:
Dear Housing Management Team, I am writing to request that someone be sent to clean the graffiti on the wall at the entrance inside the corridor of our building. Woodsford Portland Street London.This issue has been present for approximately 10 years, and unfortunately, it has not yet been addressed. I would appreciate it if this matter could be looked into and resolved as soon as possible, as it affects the appearance and environment of the building. Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portland Street, Walworth, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shoot up hill in front of Slade court, 28th April
item.description:
Offences graffiti on lamppost and green box

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walm Lane, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass and bushes not cut in communal dog part, 28th April
item.description:
I reported last week and it was marked as completed and its still over grown. And not been touched

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Inville Road, Walworth, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trash in the street, 28th April
item.description:
It’s been there for days, smells

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Salon Sound flyposted sign on road, 28th April
item.description:
Salon Sound flyposted sign on road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, South Lambeth Road, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 11’’ pothole adjacent to manhole cover, 28th April
item.description:
Pothole has been here for several weeks and is getting larger

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mornington Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog waste in garden and shared walkways. Food and dog waste in garden, 28th April
item.description:
My neighbour refuses to clean up after her dog pops in the walkway, shared garden which she shares with flat 2, flat 3 and number 17, flat 1, 2 and 3. We have tried to tell her to please clean up after herself as it’s bringing foxes, rats and other pests into the garden and messing up our shoes and the general site of the home, but she never does and repeatedly slams the doors in our faces when we try to communicate with her. The rubbish from her house parties and gatherings is left in garden which blows everywhere and she doesn’t clean it up. Please help us as we would like to keep the place looking as neat and pest free as when we moved in which is what we are paying for. If we get any serious problems with rats the council will have to pay more to remove them - which isn’t fair to the council either. The gardeners from Southwark Council are also refusing to cut grass due to the amount of dog poo left there, which she and her children refuse to clean.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wood Vale, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Telephone manhole loose, 28th April
item.description:
The barriers were there before Christmas. I pickee them up today as they have been laying flat on pavement. Not sure if it was Virgin or community fibre.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlyle Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 3 Millman St opposite the School., 28th April
item.description:
Young tree leaning at 45 degrees over the pavement. Loose roots. Happened Tuesday 28/04/26 late afternoon. Wind or lorry collision?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Millman Street, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown grass verge., 28th April
item.description:
The grass needs cutting as it is not only an eyesore but an invitation for people to dump rubbish and dog waste bags. This area was left to grow out of hand before and became a dumping ground and the residents that look out onto this area do not wish it to get to how it did before.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mungo Park Way, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ashbourne Grove-Growing Litter, 28th April
item.description:
Litter has not been removed and it continues to grow, causing a health and safety problem.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Ashbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees over grown restricting alley way, 28th April
item.description:
Trees/bushes are over hanging into Alley from St Marks Primary School. Restricting movement in the alley during busy times.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aylesbury Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ashbourne Grove- Flytipping, 28th April
item.description:
A chair has not been disposed of. This area keeps being flytipped at this specific spot from the apartment behing the silver gates. It needs to stop.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Ashbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
